productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women Solid Purple Knit Top
description: Composition Purple knit top made of 100% acrylic, has a shawl neckline, short sleeves, ribbed ripples knitted on the torso, and a combination of knit and purl on the bottom half Fit Slim Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Winter is not just about cardigans and pullovers. Give that regular tunic top cut a defined look with this acrylic knit sweater with a shawl collar from jealous 21. Flaunt your long neck and bask in the mild warmth of the winter sun with this tunic sweater. Slip into a pair of black stockings, add on a jazzy clutch and enjoy those winter night parties in style. Product is a size M on a model of height 5'7” and chest 33”
